Interface IImageView

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to members that control an image (service) view.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("26925225-C546-43E1-A89D-AB27CC26E8FB")]
public interface IImageView

Properties

Adaptive

Indicates if view properties are adaptive to view content.

bool Adaptive { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

int

string

rstPixelType PixelType { get; set; }
